storage.notes: microSD/SDHC/SDXC up to 1TB; NAS (NFS, SMB/CIFS) + ANR.

features: TandemVu: fixed 6MP panoramic (190° H) + 4MP 25x DarkFighter PTZ, tracked together
25x optical / 16x digital zoom, 360° pan, -20° to 90° tilt, 300 presets, auto-tracking 3.0
hybrid supplement: panoramic white light 40m + IR 60m, PTZ IR up to 400m
dedicated large-scale AI perimeter protection (line crossing/intrusion/entrance/exit), ~90% fewer false alarms
LPR (124+ countries/regions), vehicle attribute detection, face capture/comparison (150k library)
WDR 120 dB (panoramic) / 150 dB (PTZ), EIS with gyroscope, digital defog
7 alarm in / 2 out, audio line in/out, RS-485
IP67, IK10 (excluding glass window), lightning/surge protection
release_notes: Specs verified against the official Hikvision datasheet DS-2SF7C425MXG2/LM-EL/26 (Ver. 20260417). One entry covers the /LM-EL, /LM-ELW, /LM-ELY (NEMA 4X anti-corrosion), and /LM-ELWY SKUs — identical camera spec, differing only in coating/hardware options.

frigate.notes: TandemVu has multiple channels — panoramic (channel 1) and PTZ (channel 2); add each as needed.

home_assistant.notes: Use ONVIF integration. Default ONVIF port 80. Enable in Configuration > Network > Integration Protocol.

blue_iris.notes: Select 'Hikvision' profile. Add panoramic and PTZ channels separately.
